scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and Shiranui Flare performing "Suki Kirai" by HoneyWorks.
Transition scene with Yuzuki Choco changing into a new 3D outfit.
Yuzuki Choco and Shiranui Flare performing "Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru" by HoneyWorks.

subtitles.original: ...目にみるだけに
subtitles.english: ...just to see it with my eyes.

subtitles.original: 触って確かめなきゃだから
subtitles.english: So I have to touch it to make sure.

subtitles.original: 動き出そうよ　自分らしくね
subtitles.english: Let's start moving, in our own way.

subtitles.original: 楽しく生きるの
subtitles.english: Living happily,

subtitles.original: 毎日が奇跡
subtitles.english: Every day is a miracle.

subtitles.original: 言わずに悔やむより勇気出そう
subtitles.english: Instead of regretting what's unsaid, let's have courage.

subtitles.original: ずっと前から　うんんと前から　聞いてみたくて待ってた
subtitles.english: I've been waiting for a long, long time to ask you.

subtitles.original: 私から最初に伝えてしまえ　「大好きです」
subtitles.english: I'll be the first to say it: "I love you."

subtitles.original: ずっと前だよ　うんと前だよ　聞いたことに応えて
subtitles.english: It's been a long, long time, so answer what I asked.

subtitles.original: どんなふうに感じてるの？　全部見せてよ
subtitles.english: How are you feeling? Show me everything.

subtitles.original: 楽しく生きるの
subtitles.english: Living happily,

subtitles.original: 毎日が奇跡
subtitles.english: Every day is a miracle.

subtitles.original: 本当は不安でも勇気出そう
subtitles.english: Even if I'm anxious, let's have courage.

subtitles.original: 行くよ！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: うん！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: ずっと前から　うんんと前から　聞いてみたくて待ってた
subtitles.english: I've been waiting for a long, long time to ask you.

subtitles.original: 私から最初に伝えてしまえ　「大好きです」
subtitles.english: I'll be the first to say it: "I love you."

subtitles.original: ずっと前だよ　うんと前だよ　聞いたことに応えて
subtitles.english: It's been a long, long time, so answer what I asked.

subtitles.original: どんなふうに感じてるの？　全部見せてよ
subtitles.english: How are you feeling? Show me everything.

subtitles.original: 世界は恋に落ちている
subtitles.english: The world is falling in love,

subtitles.original: 光の矢　胸を刺す
subtitles.english: An arrow of light pierces my heart.

subtitles.original: 君をわかりたいんだよ
subtitles.english: I want to understand you,

subtitles.original: ねぇ　教えて
subtitles.english: Hey, tell me.

subtitles.original: 世界は恋に落ちている
subtitles.english: The World is Falling in Love

subtitles.original: 作詞・作曲: HoneyWorks
subtitles.english: Lyrics & Composition: HoneyWorks

subtitles.english: Just a bit of regret over our passing words,

subtitles.original: 涙こぼれて
subtitles.english: Tears spill over.

subtitles.original: 忙しい感情　鼓動にリンクする
subtitles.english: My busy emotions link with my heartbeat,

subtitles.english: Tuning,

subtitles.original: 確かめたいんだ

subtitles.original: 今日も盛りすぎた事

subtitles.english: I won't forget, I can't forget,
